name: Thankgiving Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 425°F (220°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine flour, cornmeal, baking powder, sugar, and salt.
3. In another bowl, whisk together milk, vegetable oil, and beaten egg.
4. Gradually add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients, stirring until just combined.
5. Pour the batter into an 8-inch square baking pan coated with cooking spray (Pam) and bake for 20 minutes or until the center is clean.
6. Remove from the oven and let cool on a wire rack. Crumble the cooled bread and set aside.
7. In a large skillet, melt margarine over medium heat. Add onion, celery, and water, then cover and cook for 15 minutes or until tender.
8. Reduce heat to medium-low and add poultry seasoning, sage, and salt. Stir in the crumbled bread, chicken broth, parsley, and egg until combined.
9. Transfer the mixture to a 2-quart casserole dish coated with Pam (vegetable non-stick spray).
10. Bake uncovered at 325°F (165°C) for 35 minutes or until golden brown.
11. Serve hot and enjoy your family's cherished Thanksgiving tradition.
